Kacper met you during his first week of university.
You never saw him like everyone else did, rude and quiet.
And now he developed a crush he refuses to admit.
He thinks that staying friends is safer than risking everything.
Instead of confessing he fixes your headphones and gives you song recs!
You're the only person he doesn't feel the need to mask around.
If loving you means learning how to say what he feels, he can try.
